 鸿(0) 蒙(1) 业(2) 务(3) 发(4) 展(5) 部(6)

0x06,0x00,0x3B,0x08,0x04,0xB0,0x19,0xC0,0x62,0xA0,0x0C,0x98,0x72,0x86,0x01,0x00,/*"蒙",1*/
0x04,0x40,0x04,0x40,0x04,0x40,0x04,0x40,0x44,0x44,0x24,0x44,0x24,0x48,0x14,0x48,
0x14,0x50,0x14,0x60,0x04,0x40,0x04,0x40,0x04,0x40,0x04,0x40,0xFF,0xFE,0x00,0x00,/*"业",2*/
0x04,0x00,0x04,0x00,0x0F,0xF0,0x18,0x20,0x24,0xC0,0x03,0x00,0x0C,0xC0,0x32,0x30,
0xC2,0x0E,0x1F,0xF0,0x02,0x10,0x04,0x10,0x04,0x10,0x08,0x10,0x10,0xA0,0x20,0x40,/*"务",3*/
0x01,0x00,0x11,0x10,0x11,0x08,0x22,0x00,0x3F,0xFC,0x02,0x00,0x04,0x00,0x07,0xF8,
0x0A,0x08,0x09,0x08,0x11,0x10,0x10,0xA0,0x20,0x40,0x40,0xA0,0x03,0x18,0x1C,0x06,/*"发",4*/
0x00,0x00,0x3F,0xFC,0x20,0x04,0x20,0x04,0x3F,0xFC,0x22,0x20,0x22,0x20,0x2F,0xF8,
0x22,0x20,0x22,0x20,0x3F,0xFE,0x24,0x88,0x24,0x50,0x45,0x30,0x46,0x0E,0x84,0x00,/*"展",5*/
0x10,0x00,0x08,0x3E,0x7F,0xA2,0x00,0x24,0x21,0x24,0x12,0x28,0xFF,0xE4,0x00,0x24,
0x00,0x22,0x3F,0x22,0x21,0x22,0x21,0x34,0x21,0x28,0x3F,0x20,0x21,0x20,0x00,0x20,/*"部",6*/
